title: ConsoleFilter
description: A mod that enables the user to filter specific console messages/logs in Minecraft servers
body: # 🧩 ConsoleFilter A lightweight Minecraft mod to clean up noisy **console logs** — configurable, customizable, and super handy for developers, server admins, and pack creators. ## 🔧 Features 🔍 **Filter out unwanted log messages** using custom keywords. 🧠 Simple config file (**filter_config.txt**) for easy editing. 🎯 Minimal performance impact. ## 📁 Configuration A config file is created at: **/config/consolefilter/filter_config.txt** ### Default config: ![The default config of the filter_config.txt file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aedf8fff537fac850abf238ad83f6ee16ad6faa0.png) ✅ Add or remove keywords as needed (Note: Keywords are case sensitive) ✅ Messages containing any of these keywords will be **suppressed** from console output. ✅ If you are an OP, you can run **/consolefilter reload** in-game to apply the changes without restarting. (Only for version 1.6.0 and above) **☕ Fuel My Code with Coffee!** Liked the mod? Keep me caffeinated and semi-functional 😴 by dropping a coffee here. Thanks, you legend! 😎
